meaning: adj.猪一般的,馋嘴的,贪心的
examples: Also do not know who said that, say to eat nutritious, hey, I can always find this piece piggish highfalutin excuse.
On China Swine, the 'spread' between buy and sell prices (part of the cost to trade) exceeded a piggish 40% last week.
Piggish table manners; the piggy fat-cheeked little boy and his porcine pot-bellied father; swinish slavering over food.
One must remember that, when Nokia had their piggish Symbian, Nokia had full control over the OS. Not so with Windows Phone 8.
